zh.Bedwellty, Monmouthshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙姆爾貝德維爾迪
zh.Bedwellty, Monmouthshire, Wales, United: 英國威爾斯蒙姆爾貝德維爾迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu於大約1279年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Adam John Adams90歲，母親Gwent John80歲。他於大約1300年與Mrs Philip son of Adam在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1392年在英國享年114歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu于大约1279年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Adam John Adams90岁，母亲Gwent John80岁。他于大约1300年与Mrs Philip son of Adam在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1392年在英国享年114岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ukrainian (standard transliteration Adamovych) and Belorussian: patronymic from the personal name Adam .
Americanized form of Serbian and Croatian Adamović, Slovak Adamovič, cognates of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu was born about 1279, in Wales, his father, Adam John Adams, was 90 and his mother, Gwent John, was 80. He married Mrs Philip son of Adam about 1300, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1392, in England, at the age of 114.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu est né environ 1279, à Galles, son père, Adam John Adams, avait 90 ans et sa mère, Gwent John, avait 80 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Philip son of Adam environ 1300, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1392, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 114 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu um 1279 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam John Adams 90 und seine Mutter Gwent John 80. Er hat um 1300 in Wales Mrs Philip son of Adam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1392 im Alter von 114 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu è nato il circa 1279 nel Galles, il suo padre, Adam John Adams, aveva 90 anni e il suo madre, Gwent John, aveva 80 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Philip son of Adam circa 1300, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1392, nel England, all'età di 114 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Werndduが約1279年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Adam John Adamsは90歳，母Gwent Johnは80歳であった。約1300年にウェールズでMrs Philip son of Adamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1392年にイギリスで114歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu(이)가 대략 1279년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam John Adams(은)는 90세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwent John(은)는 80세였다. 그는 대략 1300년 웨일스에서 Mrs Philip son of Adam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 영국에서 114세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu nasceu aproximadamente 1279, em Gales, seu pai, Adam John Adams, tinha 90 anos e sua mãe, Gwent John, tinha 80 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Philip son of Adam aproximadamente 1300, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1392, em Inglaterra, com 114 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu родился около 1279 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Adam John Adams было 90 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwent John, 80. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Philip son of Adam около 1300 г. в местности Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1392 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 114 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip ap Adam "Fychan of Wernddu nació aproximadamente 1279, en Gales, su papá, Adam John Adams, tenía 90 años y su mamá, Gwent John, tenía 80 años. Se casó con Mrs Philip son of Adam aproximadamente 1300, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1392, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 114 años.
